caption: Table 216. Document revision history
rows: Changed datasheet status to "production data". Added description of power-up and power-down phases in Section 3.5.1: Power supply scheme. Updated Table 44: HSI48 oscillator characteristics, Table 45: HSI oscillator characteristics and Table 46: CSI oscillator characteristics. Renamed Table 48 into "PLL characteristics (wide VCO frequency range)" and updated note 2.. Added Table 49: PLL characteristics (medium VCO frequency range). Updated t in Table 92: V monitoring characteristics. S_vbat BAT Updated Table 97: OPAMP characteristics.

Changed maximum Arm Core-M7 frequency to 480 MHz. Features: – Changed operational amplifier bandwidth to 7.3 MHz – Updated high-resolution timer to 2.1 ns – Updated low-power consumption feature Updated voltage scaling in Section 3.5.1: Power supply scheme. Added VOS0 in Section 3.5.3: Voltage regulator. Updated HSE clock in Section 3.7.1: Clock management. Removed ETH_TX_ER from Table 7: STM32H750xB pin/ball definition. Updated Section 6: Electrical characteristics (rev Y): – Added note related to decoupling capacitor tolerance below Figure 11: Power supply scheme. – Added note 2. related to CEXT in Table 23: VCAP operating conditions. – Updated note 2 below Figure 19: Recommended NRST pin protection. – Updated f in Table 44: HSI48 oscillator characteristics. HSI48 – Updated t in Table 45: HSI oscillator characteristics. stab – Removed note 2 in Table 49: PLL characteristics (medium VCO frequency range). – Added Table 60: Output voltage characteristics for PC13, PC14, PC15 and PI8. – Added note related to PC13, PC14, PC15 an PI8 limited frequency in Table 61: Output timing characteristics (HSLV OFF). – Updated T in Table 89: VREFBUF characteristics. coeff – Table 85: ADC characteristics: updated f and added note related to f formula; S S updated t . CAL – Renamed Section 6.3.24 into Temperature and VBAT monitoring and content updated. – Updated f in Table 98: DFSDM measured timing - 1.62-3.6 V. DFSDMCLK Added Section 7: Electrical characteristics (rev V). Updated paragraph introducing all package marking schematics to add the new sentence "The printed markings may differ depending on the supply chain". Updated Table 223: Thermal characteristics. Added note related to ECOPACK®2 compliance in Section 9: Ordering information.

Updated Figure 1: STM32H750xB block diagram Updated Table 7: STM32H750xB pin/ball definition. Updated Table 8 to Table 18 (alternate functions). Updated Table 37: Peripheral current consumption in Run mode. Updated Table 135: Peripheral current consumption in Run mode. Updated Table 182: ADC characteristics. Updated Table 183: Minimum sampling time vs RAIN. Updated Table 184: ADC accuracy. Added device marking examples for all packages in Section 8: Package information

Added LQFP144 package together with STM32H750ZB part number, and LQFP176 package. In Table 1: STM32H750xB features and peripheral counts, split number of ADC channels into Direct, Fast and Slow channels; and added number of wakeup and tamper pins. Moved LSI from Backup to VDD domain in Figure 11 and Figure 64. Updated capacitor value for 1.62 V< <1.8 V and FMC_CLK =100 MHz in Section : DD SDRAM waveforms and timings. Updated Section 6.2 and Section 7.2 introduction to device mission profile. Power dissipation (P ) removed from Tables General operating conditions since this D parameter is redundant with Θ thermal resistance. JA Updated maximum frequency for condition "All peripherals disabled and VOS2" Table 128: Typical and maximum current consumption in Run mode, code with data processing running from Flash memory, cache ON, LDO regulator ON Updated condition related to f in Section : On-chip peripheral current rcc_c_ck consumption. Updated Table 179: QUADSPI characteristics in SDR mode, Figure 35: Quad-SPI timing diagram - DDR mode and Figure 87: Quad-SPI timing diagram - DDR mode. Updated f maximum value in Table 98: DFSDM measured timing - 1.62-3.6 V DFSDMCLK and Table 196: DFSDM measured timing - 1.62-3.6 V. Updated notes 4. and 5. in Table 183: Minimum sampling time vs RAIN. Updated Figure 82: TFBGA240+25 - Outline. Added note related to the availability of tape and reel packing in Section 9: Ordering information.

Added indication that patents apply to the devices in Features. Added connection between SDMMC2 and D2-to-D3 AHB bus in Figure 3: STM32H750xB bus matrix. Updated Section 3.27: True random number generator (RNG). Added Full-duplex mode in Section 3.34: Serial peripheral interfaces (SPI)/integrated interchip sound interfaces (I2S). Updated J1 and F2 signals in Figure 8: TFBGA240+25 ballout. Section 6: Electrical characteristics (rev Y): – Added a 1 μF capacitor between VDD33USB and ground in Figure 11: Power supply scheme. – Table 51: Flash memory programming: removed reference to single bank configuration in title and added t typical and maximum values. ERASE128KB – Added reference to AN4899 in Section 6.3.15: I/O port characteristics. Updated notes in Table 62: Output timing characteristics (HSLV ON). – Updated t /t and t t in Table 72: su(DV-CLKH) h(DV-CLKH) su(NWAIT-CLKH)/h(NWAIT-CLKH) Synchronous multiplexed NOR/PSRAM read timings. Changed t to (NWAIT-CLKH) t and updated t /t and t t su(NWAIT-CLKH) su(DV-CLKH) h(DV-CLKH) su(NWAIT-CLKH)/h(NWAIT-CLKH) in Table 74: Synchronous non-multiplexed NOR/PSRAM read timings. Updated t and t in Table 78: SDRAM read timings and Table 79: su(SDCLKH _Data) h(SDCLKH _Data) LPSDR SDRAM read timings. – Updated t and t in Table 82: QUADSPI characteristics in SDR mode and s(IN) h(IN) t /t and t /t in Table 83: QUADSPI characteristics in DDR mode. sr(IN) sf(IN) hr(IN) hf(IN) – Updated maximum sampling time (t ) value in Table 85: ADC characteristics. S Specified that Figure 36: ADC accuracy characteristics is an example for 12-bit resolution. – Updated t and t minimum values in Table 104: SPI dynamic characteristics. su(MI) h(MI) – Updated t t , t and t in Table 108: Dynamic characteristics: SD / MMC ISU, IH ISUD IHD characteristics, VDD = 2.7 to 3.6 V. Updated t t in Table 109: Dynamic ISU, IH characteristics: eMMC characteristics, VDD = 1.71 to 1.9 V. – Updated DuCy in Table 98: DFSDM measured timing - 1.62-3.6 V. CKOUT

Section 7: Electrical characteristics (rev V): – Added a 1 μF capacitor between VDD33USB and ground in Figure 64: Power supply scheme. – Replaced Min V by Min V in Table 121: Supply voltage and maximum DD DDLDO frequency configuration. – Table 148: Flash memory programming: removed reference to single bank configuration in title and added t typical and maximum values. ERASE128KB – Added reference to AN4899 in Section 7.3.15: I/O port characteristics. Changed capacitance value for speed 10 and t/t, and speed for 11 and t/t/F Table 159: r f r f max Output timing characteristics (HSLV ON). – Updated t /t and t t in Table 169: su(DV-CLKH) h(DV-CLKH) su(NWAIT-CLKH)/h(NWAIT-CLKH) Synchronous multiplexed NOR/PSRAM read timings. Changed t to (NWAIT-CLKH) t and updated t /t and t t su(NWAIT-CLKH) su(DV-CLKH) h(DV-CLKH) su(NWAIT-CLKH)/h(NWAIT-CLKH) in Table 171: Synchronous non-multiplexed NOR/PSRAM read timings. Updated t and t in Table 175: SDRAM read timings and su(SDCLKH _Data) h(SDCLKH _Data) Table 176: LPSDR SDRAM read timings. – Updated t and t in Table 179: QUADSPI characteristics in SDR mode and s(IN) h(IN) t /t and t /t in Table 180: QUADSPI characteristics in DDR mode. sr(IN) sf(IN) hr(IN) hf(IN) – Added reference to AN5354 application note in note of Table 182: ADC characteristics. Specified that Figure 36: ADC accuracy characteristics is an example for 12-bit resolution. – Changed temperature condition to 130 °C for TS_CAL2 in Table 189: Temperature sensor calibration values. – Updated DuCy in Table 196: DFSDM measured timing - 1.62-3.6 V. CKOUT – Updated Figure 97: USART timing diagram in Master mode and Figure 98: USART timing diagram in Slave mode. – Updated t and t in Table 203: SPI dynamic characteristics. su(MI) h(MI) – Updated t t , t and t in Table 207: Dynamics characteristics: SD / MMC ISU, IH ISUD IHD characteristics, VDD = 2.7 to 3.6 V. Updated t t in Table 208: Dynamics ISU, IH characteristics: eMMC characteristics VDD = 1.71V to 1.9V.

Added reference to errata sheet in Section 1: Introduction. Figure 1: STM32H750xB block diagram: changed APB1 and APB2 maximum frequency to 120 MHZ, and WKUP[5:0] to WKUP[6:1]. Changed WKUP[5:0] to WKUP[6:1] in Table 7: STM32H750xB pin/ball definition Updated Figure 3: STM32H750xB bus matrix. Modified Section 3.5.1: Power supply scheme Updated Section 3.24: Digital camera interface (DCMI) (modified supported format) Updated number of microphones that can be supported by the SAI in Section 3.35: Serial audio interfaces (SAI). Updated Table 7: STM32H750xB pin/ball definition: – Removed FDCAN1_RXFD_MODE, FDCAN1_TXFD_MODE, FDCAN2_RXFD_MODE and FDCAN2_TXFD_MODE functions from and all alternate function tables. – Added note to VDD50USB. – Added note to PB12 and PB13, added note to PB12 and PB13, changed PB1 I/O structure to TT_A, and changed F1 and G2 to VSS. Added notes 2, 3 and 4, updated F1, F2 and G2 in Figure 8: TFBGA240+25 ballout. Section 6: Electrical characteristics (rev Y) – Updated Figure 11: Power supply scheme. – Updated Table 10: Current characteristics – Changed I to I in Table 48: I/O static characteristics leak lkg – Modified Table 44: EMI characteristics for fHSE = 8 MHz and fCPU = 400 MHz – Updated section I/O dynamic current consumption and I/O static current consumption. – Updated Table 30: High-speed external user clock characteristics. – Updated F for speed 10 and 11 in Table 51: Output timing characteristics (HSLV max OFF). – Updated Figure 34: ADC accuracy characteristics and Figure 35: Typical connection diagram when using the ADC with FT/TT pins featuring analog switch function . Updated T maximum value in Table 80: Temperature sensor characteristics L – Updated Figure 36: Power supply and reference decoupling (V not connected to REF+ V ) and Figure 35: Typical connection diagram when using the ADC with FT/TT DDA pins featuring analog switch function. – Changed f maximum frequency to 240 MHz in Table 91: TIMx characteristics TIMxCLK – Replaced FMC_CLK by FMC_SDCLK in Section : SDRAM waveforms and timings. Section 7: Electrical characteristics (rev V) – Updated Figure 62: Power supply scheme. – Updated section I/O dynamic current consumption and I/O static current consumption. – Updated Table 108: Current characteristics – Updated V max value in Table 110: General operating conditions CORE – Updated Table 127: High-speed external user clock characteristics. – Updated F for speed 10 and 11 in Table 148: Output timing characteristics (HSLV max OFF). – Modified Table 141: EMI characteristics for fHSE = 8 MHz and fCPU = 400 MHz – Replaced FMC_CLK by FMC_SDCLK in Section : SDRAM waveforms and timings.

– Updated Figure 84: ADC accuracy characteristics and Figure 85: Typical connection diagram when using the ADC with FT/TT pins featuring analog switch function. – Updated T maximum value in Table 178: Temperature sensor characteristics L – Updated Figure 86: Power supply and reference decoupling (V not connected to REF+ V ) and Figure 85: Typical connection diagram when using the ADC with FT/TT DDA pins featuring analog switch function. – Changed V maximum value to V -0.2 in Table 176: DAC accuracy. DAC_OUT REF+ – Changed I to I in Table 145: I/O static characteristics leak lkg – Updated t in Table 197: Dynamics characteristics: SD / MMC characteristics, OH VDD = 2.7 to 3.6 V. – Added Section : USB OTG_FS characteristics. – Updated Table 200: Dynamics characteristics: USB ULPI Added Section 8.1: Device marking (device marking information removed from package sections and moved to this section) Updated Section 8.2: LQFP100 package information (1L), Section 8.6: LQFP144 package information (1A), Section 8.9: LQFP176 package information (1T), Section 8.10: UFBGA(176+25) package information (A0E7) and Section 8.12: TFBGA240+25 package information. Modified title for footprint figures and PCB design rules tables (examples instead of recommendations) Updated information on pin count in Section 9: Ordering information Added Section 10: Important security notice.

In the context of I2C, replaced master and slave by controller and target, respectively. Updated features on cover page. Updated Table 1: STM32H750xB features and peripheral counts. Updated Figure 1: STM32H750xB block diagram. Updated Section 3.4: Boot modes. Updated Figure 8: TFBGA240+25 ballout. Updated Table 6: Legend/abbreviations used in the pinout table. Updated Table 110: General operating conditions. Updated Table 112: VCAP operating conditions. Updated Table 125: Peripheral current consumption in Run mode. Updated Section : Low-speed external user clock generated from an external source. Updated Figure 67: Typical application with an 8 MHz crystal. Updated Table 145: I/O static characteristics. Updated Figure 84: ADC accuracy characteristics. Updated Table 172: ADC characteristics. Updated Table 178: Temperature sensor characteristics. Updated Table 208: LQFP176 - Mechanical data. Updated Table 214: TFBGA240+25 - Example of PCB design rules.
